entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Workflow Trigger Rule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE WorkflowLaunch PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <WorkflowLaunch status="failed" workflowName="HR Source Joiner event" workflowRef="HR Source Joiner event"> <Messages> <Message key="err_exception" type="Error"> <Parameters> <Message key="msg_plain_text" type="Error"> <Parameters> <String>failed to lazily initialize a collection of role: sailpoint.object.Identity.assignedRoles, could not initialize proxy - no Session</String> </Parameters> </Message> </Parameters> </Message> </Messages> <TaskResultRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.TaskResult" id="HR Source Joiner event - e64a37bbb85c4c2bbe640ef359a16246" name="HR Source Joiner event - e64a37bbb85c4c2bbe640ef359a16246"/> </TaskResultRef> <WorkflowCaseRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.WorkflowCase" id="c0a8005390741d9d81907449524f0060" name="HR Source Joiner event - e64a37bbb85c4c2bbe640ef359a16246"/> </WorkflowCaseRef> </WorkflowLaunch>
